title: Oregon legislature considering funding for 211info, statewide emergency hotline - 211info
text: SALEM, Ore. – The sheer number of emergencies over the past three years is prompting the state to take a more formal look at 211info , an emergency hotline that’s stepped in to help answer questions for the public during the pandemic, recent extreme weather, and wildfires. Full story on KDRV . Search Popular Posts Categories Equity News
